metadata.description: Rem's buddy: Claude Code skills for coding standards, testing, architecture, git workflows, TDD bugfix

plugins.name: bugfix
plugins.description: TDD bug fix workflow: reproduce with failing test, fix, verify, commit

plugins.name: git-workflows
plugins.description: Conventional commit, push, and GitLab merge request workflows with always-on commit conventions

plugins.name: coding-standards
plugins.description: Coding conventions for self-documenting code: naming, comments, docstrings

plugins.name: python-testing
plugins.description: Python testing conventions, philosophy, and organization with pytest

plugins.name: python-architecture
plugins.description: Python backend architecture: hexagonal layers, DDD, CQRS, event-driven patterns

plugins.name: prompt-optimization
plugins.description: Always-on prompt interpretation: resolve ambiguity from context, decompose vague requests, minimize unnecessary questions

plugins.name: attribution-policy
plugins.description: Always-on rule: do not add 'Generated with Claude Code' or 'Co-Authored-By: Claude' attribution to commits, PRs, MRs, or docs

plugins.name: issue-workflow
plugins.description: Notion-issue-driven development loop: read spec, analyze, plan, implement, open MR, sync progress back to Notion
